_comment: MERIDIAN verified-image manifest. `verified` is the growable library of Wikimedia Commons files whose subject + licence + author have been confirmed from the file's own Commons page (add to it only from a network-connected session that can open the page). `heroes` assigns library files to desks for a given issue; the Photo-Edition build reads `heroes`, filters by `issue`, and inserts each as a .ph-frame above that desk's headline. Honesty rule: never mislabel. `specific:true` = the image IS the named subject; `specific:false` = a clearly-labelled representative/generic image. Conceptual figures (charts, maps, diagrams) always stay as original SVG — never a photo.

verified.subject: semiconductor dies on a silicon wafer (generic)
verified.author: Kuebi / Armin Kübelbeck

heroes.author: Benh Lieu Song
heroes.caption: Marina Bay at dusk — representative of the island the Circle Line now loops.

heroes.author: Kuebi / Armin Kübelbeck
heroes.caption: Semiconductor dies on a wafer — representative, not the specific memory parts discussed.
Personal audio — representative; NOT the Nothing Ear (3a) reviewed here.

heroes.author: ESO
heroes.caption: The Milky Way — representative deep sky, not the Euclid quasar field.
